description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, host Chase talks with John Cinque, an engineer at Corp Solana Protocol, about his journey from studying physics to working in the Solana ecosystem. They discuss his early career, experiences at Bloomberg, and the evolution of Solana since its mainnet launch.
topic_summary: Chase interviews John Cinque about his background in physics, transition to computer science, and contributions to the Solana ecosystem, including the token swap and stake pools. They reflect on the growth of Solana since its inception [t=43:82].
